ham.subject: Transaction Alert – Recent Purchase at ABC Retailers
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to inform you that a transaction of $125.47 was made on your account at ABC Retailers on 2026-04-05. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our fraud prevention team immediately at 1-800-XYZ-1234.

Thank you for using our banking services.

Sincerely,
Your Bank

spam.subject: FedEx Delivery Notice – Immediate Action Required to Avoid Additional Charges
spam.body:
